note: This repo is a single UI prototype (prototype/index.html), not a buildable component library. There is no package.json, dist/, or Storybook, so the standard converter does not apply. We sync the design LANGUAGE only — tokens, fonts, and styling idioms — so the design agent renders generic components on-brand. Source of truth: prototype/index.html tailwind.config + the DESIGN-claude.md design doc at the repo root (../../DESIGN-claude.md).
